title: X-TIE Fighter
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Citation}} {{StarshipClass |image=[[File:X-TIEUgly.jpg]] |name=X-TIE Fighter |designer= |manufacturer=[[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]][[Scum and Villainy (sourcebook)|''Scum and Villainy'']] |line=[[Ugly/Legends|Ugly]]''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' |model=[[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]]/[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] |type=[[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] |cost=60,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] |modifier= |sysmods= |length=12.5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed=1,050 km/h |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive=Class 1.0 - 1.5 |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen=None or equipped |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation=1 to 10-jump memory |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=[[Laser cannon/Legends|Laser cannons]] (4) |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=*[[Pilot/Legends|Pilot]] (1) *[[Astromech droid/Legends|Astromech droid]] |skeleton= |passengers=None |capacity=110 kg |cargohandling= |consumables=1 week |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability=Military |role= |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation=*[[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]] *[[Sacorrian Triad]]''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' *[[Pirate/Legends|Pirates]] *[[Smuggler/Legends|Smugglers]] *Private defense fleets *Other groups }} {{Quote|It's an X-TIE Ugly, Luke! And the only shipyards that can put those together—''"
"''—are in Corellia.|[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|''[[Assault at Selonia]]''}} The '''X-TIE Fighter''' was an [[Ugly/Legends|Ugly]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] made out of the cannibalized parts of a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] and a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]]. The ship consisted of an X-wing fuselage and engines, and solar panels from a [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] Fighter. The solar panels replaced the [[S-foils/Legends|S-foils]] that were present on a standard X-wing. ==Characteristics== [[File:X-TIE2.jpg|thumb|left|200px|An [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X]]-[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE]] [[Starfighter/Legends|Fighter]].]] Weaponry usually consisted of two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] mounted on the fuselage, where the proton torpedo launchers were located on the X-wing, though some mounted the X-wing's lasers on the fuselage and others retained one warhead launcher at the price of carrying only a single laser. A far superior variant was the [[X-ceptor]], which used [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE interceptor]] solar panels and thus had an armament comparable to that of a standard X-wing. Like many other uglies, this ship was barely spaceworthy, and used predominantly by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], and other cash-poor groups. Though capable of harassing unarmed commercial vessels, these ships could be destroyed en masse by a single true starfighter. ==History== The [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Forces]] were known to employ Uglies, including X-TIEs, during the disorganized period after the fall of the Empire. [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] agent [[Belindi Kalenda]] used one to escape the Corellian system and warn the New Republic moments before the [[Corellian Crisis]]. ==Behind the scenes== The non-canon ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Rebuild the Galaxy]]'' features ships called [[TIE-wing]]s which resemble X-TIEs,{{SWKidsYouTube|ThAGOmfly0I|LEGO Star Wars: Rebuild the Galaxy Part Four | Full Episode}}{{LEGOWeb|url=en-us/product/tie-fighter-x-wing-mash-up-75393|text=LEGO® ''Star Wars''™ TIE Fighter & X-Wing Mash-Up}} although in that continuity TIE-wings seem to be a standard design rather than Uglies. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of X-TIE Fighters}} *''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Krytos Trap (unabridged audiobook)}} *''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' *''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' ==Sources== *''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' *''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]'' {{Po}} *[[Scum and Villainy (sourcebook)|''Scum and Villainy'']] *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=X-TIE Sternjäger |es=Caza TIE-X |fr=X-TIE }} [[Category:Uglies]]
